# Sunmount Solutions Private Limited

> India's indigenous solar PV mounting structure manufacturer. ISO 9001 & TÜV SÜD certified aluminium and steel mounting systems engineered for wind loads up to 200 km/h, supplied across India and 50+ countries. Based in Sirsa, Haryana.

Sunmount (brand name SunMount®) designs and manufactures rooftop solar mounting systems with interactive 3D product models on its website. Product range covers trapezoidal metal roofs, standing-seam roofs, flat/low-pitch roofs, and maintenance walkways.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sunmount.in/): Company overview, product highlights, certifications, and team.
- [Products](https://www.sunmount.in/products): Full mounting-systems catalogue with interactive 3D models and technical specifications — Mono Rail (65/70/100mm), Mini Rail (70/100mm, Short), Long Rail (Lite/Pro/Ultra), Standing Seam clamps (55/70/100mm), Inclined System, and FRP Walkway. Includes accessories and hardware.
- [Contact](https://www.sunmount.in/contact): Request a quote, sales enquiry form, and headquarters details.
- [Careers](https://www.sunmount.in/careers): Current job openings and online application form.

## Resources

- [Product Catalogue (PDF)](https://www.sunmount.in/catalogue.pdf): Complete printable catalogue of all mounting systems and accessories.
